title: 2D Motion Graphics Animator for Driving Education Shorts (Driving Sense Brand)
brief: We are building a modern driving education brand called Driving Sense™ focused on beginner drivers, nervous drivers, teens, and defensive driving education. We need a motion graphics animator to create clean top-down animated traffic explainer videos similar to viral driving education pages. Examples include: * lane changes * right turns * left turns * parallel parking * highway merging * 4-way stops * hazard recognition * defensive driving scenarios Style: * top-down traffic animation * clean professional visuals * realistic vehicle movement * arrows, signals, labels, road markings * mobile-first vertical shorts (1080x1920) Deliverables: Phase 1: Create 10 reusable branded templates for our content system. Phase 2: Ongoing short-form video production. Required skills: * Adobe After Effects * Motion graphics * Short-form social content * Infographic animation * Sound design Please send examples of similar animated explainer work.
